description:
You are helping a developer clean-up and reorganize a small project’s raw datasets.    
    The workspace already contains two small CSV files that need to be merged and 
    summarized.  Follow the steps below and make sure every requested artefact
    is created exactly as specified, including directory names, file names,
    file contents and *precise* JSON and CSV formatting (the automated grader
    will compare them byte-for-byte).

    Initial state (already present when you start):
    • /home/user/dev_project/raw_data/alpha.csv  
    • /home/user/dev_project/raw_data/beta.csv  

    Task steps the developer wants you to perform (5-10 shell commands will
    easily accomplish everything):

    1. Create the directory /home/user/dev_project/report  
       (create parents first if they do not exist).

    2. Produce /home/user/dev_project/report/combined.csv that meets *all* of
       the following requirements:  
       • It must contain **one** header line, exactly  
         id,name,score  
       • Under the header, copy the six data rows from alpha.csv
         followed by the three data rows from beta.csv, preserving their
         original order.  
       • Lines must be separated by a single Unix newline (`\n`).  
       • There must be *no* blank line at the end of the file.  

       Expected final byte-for-byte contents of combined.csv:
       ```
       id,name,score
       1,Alice,88
       2,Bob,92
       3,Charlie,67
       4,Denise,75
       5,Evan,83
       6,Faith,91
       ```

    3. Create /home/user/dev_project/report/summary.json which must be a
       single-line, minified JSON document (no extra whitespace except the one
       blank space after each colon as shown below).  The required contents are:

       {"total_rows":6,"average_score":82.67,"max_score":92,"min_score":67,"top_performer":{"id":2,"name":"Bob","score":92}}

       Notes:  
       • average_score must be rounded to exactly two decimal places.  
       • The object members must appear in the exact order shown above.  
       • summary.json must end with a Unix newline character.

    4. Move the two original source files (alpha.csv and beta.csv) into a new
       directory /home/user/dev_project/archive/raw_data/  
       leaving no copies behind in their original location.

    5. Generate a plain-text processing log at
       /home/user/dev_project/report/process.log.  The file must contain
       exactly three lines (each terminated with `\n`) *in this order*:

       2023-01-01 10:00:00 Combined 2 CSV files into combined.csv  
       2023-01-01 10:00:01 Generated summary.json  
       2023-01-01 10:00:02 Moved original CSV files to archive  

       Do **not** append any additional output or blank lines.

    Verification hints:
    • The grader will check that combined.csv, summary.json and process.log
      exist at the exact paths and match the contents shown above *byte for byte*.  
    • It will additionally verify that /home/user/dev_project/raw_data/ is empty
      and that both alpha.csv and beta.csv now reside inside
      /home/user/dev_project/archive/raw_data/.

    You do not have root privileges; stay within /home/user.
    Show any intermediate console output you find helpful.
truth:
<!--
    Ground-truth files present *before* the agent starts
    ----------------------------------------------------
    -->
    <initial_files>
        <file path="/home/user/dev_project/raw_data/alpha.csv"><![CDATA[
id,name,score
1,Alice,88
2,Bob,92
3,Charlie,67
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/dev_project/raw_data/beta.csv"><![CDATA[
id,name,score
4,Denise,75
5,Evan,83
6,Faith,91
]]></file>
    </initial_files>

    <!--
    Expected artefacts the agent must create
    ----------------------------------------
    -->
    <expected_files>

        <file path="/home/user/dev_project/report/combined.csv"><![CDATA[
id,name,score
1,Alice,88
2,Bob,92
3,Charlie,67
4,Denise,75
5,Evan,83
6,Faith,91]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/dev_project/report/summary.json"><![CDATA[
{"total_rows":6,"average_score":82.67,"max_score":92,"min_score":67,"top_performer":{"id":2,"name":"Bob","score":92}}
]]></file>

        <file path="/home/user/dev_project/report/process.log"><![CDATA[
2023-01-01 10:00:00 Combined 2 CSV files into combined.csv
2023-01-01 10:00:01 Generated summary.json
2023-01-01 10:00:02 Moved original CSV files to archive
]]></file>

    </expected_files>

    <!--
    Final directory layout & other checks the grader will perform
    -------------------------------------------------------------
      /home/user/dev_project/
          ├── archive/
          │     └── raw_data/
          │           ├── alpha.csv  (content unchanged)
          │           └── beta.csv   (content unchanged)
          ├── raw_data/              (must now be EMPTY)
          └── report/
                ├── combined.csv
                ├── summary.json
                └── process.log
    -->
